svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.4.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Development Flow" id="dev-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1427" dy="859" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="phase1_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;fontSize=12;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="560" x="80" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase1_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#333333;" value="1. 기획" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="100" x="90" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="👤 사용자" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="100" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🧠 Main Claude
(오케스트레이터)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="270" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="planner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="📋 기획자
(opus)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="470" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="main"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="main" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="planner"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prd" parent="1" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="📄 PRD
(agents-cowork/)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="300" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="phase1_bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=0.488;exitY=1.021;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="370" y="193" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="370" y="190" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="369.58" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase2_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="500" x="120" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase2_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#333333;" value="2. 핸드오프 문서 작성" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="200" x="110" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="handoff_be" parent="1" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="📄 BE 핸드오프" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="140" x="170" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="handoff_fe" parent="1" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="📄 FE 핸드오프" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="140" x="430" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="prd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="handoff_be"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="prd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="handoff_fe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase3_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0f7ff;strokeColor=#4a86c8;dashed=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="500" x="120" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase3_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#333333;" value="3. 개발 (Gemini, 독립 세션)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="250" x="110" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gemini_be" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🤖 Gemini BE 세션
백엔드 개발" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="155" y="462" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gemini_fe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🤖 Gemini FE 세션
프론트엔드 개발" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="415" y="462" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="handoff_be" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="gemini_be"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="handoff_fe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="gemini_fe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase4_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff8e1;strokeColor=#f9a825;dashed=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="500" x="120" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="phase4_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#333333;" value="4. 코드 리뷰 & 보완 (Claude)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="260" x="110" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claude_be" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🔵 Claude BE 에이전트
(opus)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="155" y="582" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claude_fe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="🟢 Claude FE 에이전트
(sonnet)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="415" y="582" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="gemini_be" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="claude_be"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="gemini_fe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="claude_fe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="review" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="5. 통합 리뷰
Main + 사용자" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="180" x="280" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="claude_be" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="review"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="claude_fe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="review"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uwAbneEKx1ubxHEnzb_N-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="qa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="phase4_bg"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="778" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="595" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="6. QA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="310" y="755" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="review" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="qa"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#67AB9F;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="7. 배포 준비 완료 ✅" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="160" x="290" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="qa" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;" target="deploy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
